$comment: Machine-readable composability source for the registry UI and the dry-run seed. Mirrors COMPOSABILITY.md. relationships[] become attestable triples (subject predicate object); presets[] become a preset atom + 'includes enforcer' triples. Every name MUST exist in enforcers.json (validated by scripts/validate-seed.mjs).

predicates.complements: Each constrains a different dimension; combining tightens scope with no overlap.
predicates.composes with: Safe to use together and commonly do; may overlap but do not contradict.
predicates.conflicts with: Redundant or contradictory — one subsumes the other, or they can deadlock a redemption.

relationships.subject: RedeemerEnforcer
relationships.reason: *who may redeem* vs *how much is unlocked*

relationships.subject: AllowedTargetsEnforcer
relationships.reason: target + method scoping commonly used together

relationships.subject: ERC20StreamingEnforcer
relationships.reason: two different release models on one token allowance contradict

relationships.subject: ExactExecutionEnforcer
relationships.reason: exact execution already fixes the target

presets.name: Time-gated token allowance
presets.intent: Move up to N of token T, but only within a validity window.

presets.name: Scoped agent action
presets.intent: Call only these methods on only these contracts, at most K times.

presets.name: Streaming payout to a fixed redeemer
presets.intent: Funds stream over time, and only a specific account may redeem.
